details.generated_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM `ndt_info`

details.question: 검사 방법별 비파괴 검사 건수를 알려줘
details.generated_sql: SELECT `방법`, COUNT(*) AS `검사 건수` FROM `ndt_info` GROUP BY `방법` ORDER BY `검사 건수` DESC;

details.question: 제품 재질별 제품 수를 알려줘
details.generated_sql: SELECT `제품내역_공인기관`, COUNT(*) AS 제품수 FROM `product_info` GROUP BY `제품내역_공인기관` ORDER BY 제품수 DESC;

details.question: 두께가 20mm 이상인 제품 목록을 보여줘
details.generated_sql: SELECT `제품번호` FROM `product_info` WHERE `제품_두께_mm` >= 20

details.question: 비파괴검사 검사자별 검사 건수를 알려줘
details.generated_sql: SELECT `비파괴검사_검사자`, COUNT(*) AS `검사 건수` FROM `product_info` GROUP BY `비파괴검사_검사자` ORDER BY `검사 건수` DESC;

details.question: 결함 유형별 이미지 수와 비율을 알려줘
details.generated_sql: SELECT `결함_유형`, COUNT(*) AS 이미지_수, (COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `image_metadata`)) AS 비율 FROM `image_metadata` GROUP BY `결함_유형` ORDER BY 이미지_수 DESC;

details.question: 수주번호별 비파괴 검사 건수와 불합격 건수를 알려줘
details.generated_sql: SELECT `수주번호`, COUNT(*) AS `전체_검사_건수`, SUM(CASE WHEN `최종_판정` = '부적합' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `불합격_건수` FROM `ndt_info` GROUP BY `수주번호`

details.question: 이미지가 있는 제품번호 목록을 10개 보여줘
details.generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT `제품번호` FROM `image_metadata` LIMIT 10

details.question: 비파괴검사와 치수검사를 모두 통과한 제품 수는?
details.generated_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM `product_info` WHERE `비파괴검사_판정` = '합격' AND `치수_육안검사_판정` = '합격';

details.question: 제품번호별로 이미지 수와 비파괴검사 결과를 함께 보여줘
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  i.`제품번호`,
  COUNT(i.`제품번호`) AS image_count,
  p.`비파괴검사_판정`
FROM `image_metadata` AS i
JOIN `product_info` AS p
  ON i.`제품번호` = p.`제품번호`
GROUP BY
  i.`제품번호`, p.`비파괴검사_판정`
ORDER BY
  i.`제품번호`;

details.question: 월별 비파괴검사 건수 추이를 알려줘
details.generated_sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', `등록일`) AS `월`, COUNT(*) AS `검사 건수` FROM `ndt_info` GROUP BY `월` ORDER BY `월`
details.error:
(pymysql.err.OperationalError) (1305, 'FUNCTION weld_db.STRFTIME does not exist')
[SQL: SELECT STRFTIME('%%Y-%%m', `등록일`) AS `월`,
       COUNT(*) AS `검사 건수`
FROM `ndt_info`
GROUP BY `월`
ORDER BY `월`]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/e3q8)

details.question: 제품번호별로 이미지 수와 비파괴검사 결과를 함께 보여줘
details.generated_sql:
SELECT
  i.`제품번호`,
  COUNT(i.`제품번호`) AS image_count,
  n.`최종_판정`
FROM `image_metadata` AS i
JOIN `ndt_info` AS n
  ON i.`제품번호` = n.`제품번호`
GROUP BY
  i.`제품번호`, n.`최종_판정`
ORDER BY
  i.`제품번호`;

details.question: 월별 비파괴검사 건수 추이를 알려줘

details.corrected_sql:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`등록일`, '%Y-%m') AS `월`,
       COUNT(*) AS `검사 건수`
FROM `ndt_info`
GROUP BY `월`
ORDER BY `월`
